co.crystaldev.alpinecore.util

Class ItemUtils

  • java.lang.Object
    • co.crystaldev.alpinecore.util.ItemUtils

  • public final class ItemUtils
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility for interacting with ItemStacks.

    This class should NOT be used if targeting 1.16+. We target 1.8 for compatibility which means these methods do not consider Netherite armor.

    Since:
    0.1.0

    • Constructor Summary
